title: Update on How to fixed item list order in connect board

posts.cookedHtml:
Hi is there an update to this query?

How to fixed item list order in connect board Platform discussions
How to make the order of list items in the connect board column (board 2) fixed, not changing according to the original board (board 1) Because I’m having problem the order of my list items is not in order according to the order of items on the source board (board 1)
